Uhh, moving on from the enemy that appeared out of nowhere, it's
time for "multiple choice"!
Out of four possible answers, go to the one you think is correct.
Now, here's the first question... Ba-dum!
Go to the answer you think is correct! Put your thinking caps on!
Here comes the final question... Ba-dum!

That's the end of the "multiple choice" quiz!
Let's head to the next stage, now!
おめでとうございます！
